title: Yaroslavl, Yaroslavl Oblast — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Yaroslavl, Yaroslavl Oblast: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Yaroslavl is a city in Yaroslavl Oblast with a population of 610,000. A historic Golden Ring city on the Volga, a UNESCO World Heritage site with stunning 13th-century churches and frescoes.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
